title: The Reserve Bank (Transfer to Public Ownership) Act, 1948
full_text: The Reserve Bank (Transfer to Public Ownership) Act, 1948 रिजर्व बैंक (लोक स्‍वामित्‍व को अन्‍तरण) अधिनियम,1948 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 194862 Act Number: 62 Enactment Date: 1948-09-23 Act Year: 1948 Short Title: The Reserve Bank (Transfer to Public Ownership) Act, 1948 Hindi Title: रिजर्व बैंक (लोक स्‍वामित्‍व को अन्‍तरण) अधिनियम,1948 Long Title: An Act to bring the share capital of the Reserve Bank of India into public ownership and to make consequential amendments in the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934. Ministry: Ministry of Finance Department: Department of Financial Services Enforcement Date: 23-09-1948 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE.
